zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de St Omer於1320年出生在英國諾福爾可布盧達爾時，他的父親Sir William St Omer44歲，母親Elizabeth de Parkin20歲。他於大約1339年與Petronilla Malmayns在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年在英國諾福爾可姆爾巴頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de St Omer于1320年出生在英国諾福爾可布盧達爾时，他的父亲Sir William St Omer44岁，母亲Elizabeth de Parkin20岁。他于大约1339年与Petronilla Malmayns在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年在英国諾福爾可姆爾巴頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de St Omer was born in 1320, in Brundall, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William St Omer, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth de Parkin, was 20. He married Petronilla Malmayns about 1339, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1365, in Mulbarton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de St Omer est né en 1320, à Brundall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William St Omer, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Parkin, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Petronilla Malmayns environ 1339, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1365, à Mulbarton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de St Omer 1320 in Brundall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William St Omer 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Parkin 20. Er hat um 1339 in Norfolk, England Petronilla Malmayns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Mulbarton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de St Omer è nato il nel 1320 nel Brundall, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William St Omer, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Parkin, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Petronilla Malmayns circa 1339, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1365, nel Mulbarton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de St Omerが1320年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンダルで生まれた時，父Sir William St Omerは44歳，母Elizabeth de Parkinは20歳であった。約1339年にイギリスノーフォルクでPetronilla Malmaynsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年にイギリスノーフォルクムルバートンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de St Omer(이)가 1320년 영국 노르폴크 브런달에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William St Omer(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Parkin(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1339년 영국 노르폴크에서 Petronilla Malmayns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국 노르폴크 뮐바턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de St Omer nasceu em 1320, em Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William St Omer, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Parkin, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronilla Malmayns aproximadamente 1339, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Mulbarton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de St Omer родился в 1320 г. в местности брундалл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William St Omer было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Parkin, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla Malmayns около 1339 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности мулбартон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de St Omer nació en 1320, en Brundall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William St Omer, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Parkin, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Petronilla Malmayns aproximadamente 1339, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1365, en Mulbarton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
